name: Watering Can
description: a soft splash of water poured from a watering can
usage: Watering crops with the watering can.

ai.prompt: Water poured from a watering can onto soil: a gentle, even sprinkling shower of droppets pattering on earth, soft and wet. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
